title: Buttery Chewy Beans Stir-fry
description: A festive vegan Ethiopian dish featuring slow-cooked beans that are buttery and chewy, perfect as a side or light main course.

ingredients.name: olive oil or vegan butter substitute

instructions: Heat olive oil or vegan butter substitute in a large pot over medium heat.
Add finely chopped onion and sauté until translucent.
Stir in minced garlic cloves, cayenne pepper, and salt. Cook for about 2 minutes.
Add soaked white kidney beans to the pot. Cover with water or vegetable broth (enough to just cover the beans).
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for at least 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
If desired, add thyme leaves and bay leaf during the last 5-10 minutes of cooking. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Once beans are cooked through and tender, remove from heat and serve hot.
